Selfhost wasm OOB bisect matrix (manual)
=======================================

Run from repo root (example):
  target/debug/arukellt check  tests/fixtures/selfhost_compile_repro/b_main_only.ark
  target/debug/arukellt compile tests/fixtures/selfhost_compile_repro/b_main_only.ark --target wasm32-wasi-p1 -o /tmp/t.wasm

Wasm-hosted compiler (stage-1), with pipeline markers on stderr:
  wasmtime run --dir=. .build/selfhost/arukellt-s1.wasm -- compile tests/fixtures/selfhost_compile_repro/b_main_only.ark --target wasm32-wasi-p1 --dump-phases pipeline -o /tmp/t.wasm

Markers:
  sh:drv:01_lex_ok .. sh:drv:08_emit_wasm_ret
  sh:emit:00_begin .. sh:emit:08_data_done

Fixtures (prefix documents order A,B,C,... from the work note):
  b_main_only.ark          single empty main
  c_two_functions.ark      two empty fns
  e_three_fn_no_calls.ark three empty fns
  f_one_direct_call.ark    one i32->i32 call
  g_string_lit.ark         String_from only
  h_builtin_print.ark      stdio::println
  d_use_foo/main.ark       use local foo.ark, no cross call
  d_use_foo/foo.ark        peer module

Record: check OK?, compile OK?, last sh: line before trap (if any), wasm validate OK?

Observed (s1.wasm + wasmtime, --dump-phases pipeline):
  b_main_only: all sh:emit:* through sh:drv:08_emit_wasm_ret (output path must be repo-relative for WASI write).
  c_two_functions: trap during sh:emit:05b1_inst_walk at get_unchecked(block.instructions, 1):
    - ii_enter=0 prints; first MirInst ok (op=1 CONST iv=1).
    - ii_enter=1 prints; trap before reading second MirInst.
    => len(block.instructions)==2 but index 1 is invalid under wasm-hosted run (Vec/layout or codegen).
  b_main_only fn0: inst_total=1, same walk completes (only index 0).
